evidence: result={"stub": True, "message": _COMING_SOON_MSG} — 9 of 10 P0 differentiators return coming-soon stubs: semantic_memory_index, knowledge_base_connector, brand_voice_enforcer, collaborative_team_space, pii_redactor, semantic_chunking, sub_agent_router, task_planner, rag_context_builder

evidence: _safe_import() pattern silently returns None on any import error; 60+ routers wired this way with no differentiated error handling for critical vs optional routers

test_plan: Test startup fails if critical router import fails; test health check endpoint reports missing routers

evidence: return {"total_runs": 0, "success": 0, ...} when DB query returns no rows; semantically correct but indistinguishable from DB error
